nodes.description: Navigate to makemytrip.com and close initial promo popups
Click Departure city search input, search for origin city, and select first matching airport option
Click Destination city search input, search for arrival city, and select first matching airport option
Click Departure Date calendar widget, find the target day and month, and select the target date
Click the big Search button and wait for flights page to load
Wait for search loading spinners to disappear and verify flight card listings are visible
